data.general: You are feeling a surge of confidence and energy today, Mesha, as the Sun, Moon, and Mars are all in your sign. This can be a great time for taking risks and pursuing your goals, but be careful not to overexert yourself. With Mercury in your 2nd house, you may be thinking a lot about your finances and material possessions.
data.luck: Your luck is shifting in your favor today, with the planetary transits suggesting that you are on the right path. The presence of Mars and the Sun in your 1st house indicates a strong sense of purpose and motivation. This is a great time to take action and pursue your desires.
data.scope: Your scope of action is expanding today, Mesha, as Jupiter and Venus are in your 3rd house. This can bring new opportunities for communication and self-expression. Be open to new ideas and perspectives, and don't be afraid to take the lead.
data.study: You may find that your mind is racing today, Mesha, as Mercury is in your 2nd house. This can be a great time for learning and intellectual pursuits, but be careful not to get too caught up in details. Focus on the bigger picture and try to stay organized.
data.love: Romantically, things may be heating up for you today, Mesha, as the Sun and Mars are in your 1st house. This can bring a sense of passion and excitement to your relationships. However, be careful not to let your emotions get the best of you.
data.travel: You may be feeling restless and ready to travel, Mesha, as Rahu is in your 11th house. This can bring new opportunities for adventure and exploration. However, be careful not to take unnecessary risks.
